name: Nevada's governor race is just warming up. Why has Lombardo's side already spent a fortune?
summary: Lombardo and Republican-aligned groups have spent more than $13 million on ads since December 2025, while Democrats have spent only about $77,000.

name: UNLV hospitality school launches new sports management degree
summary: UNLV students can soon pursue an undergraduate degree in sport hospitality management.

name: UNLV to launch sports hospitality management degree in fall
summary: Aspiring sports management professionals in Nevada now have a new path to enter the growing industry.

name: Mindfulness reduces anxiety, depression among college students
summary: Systematic review finds guided digital and multi-week mindfulness programs can strengthen campus mental health support.

name: More than 7K CCSD students use 504 plans, many families still don’t know what it covers
summary: Many students are enjoying their summer break, but it won’t be long before they are back at their desks for the new school year. This is also a time to think about the resources your child may need to succeed in school.

name: UNLV capitalizes on Las Vegas's sports boom with a new bachelor's degree program
summary: UNLV's William F. Harrah College of Hospitality is introducing the state's first undergraduate degree in sport hospitality management, the college announced Monday.The bachelor's degree program will begin in the fall.

name: ‘Democrats for Lombardo’ might say more about the Dems on the list than Lombardo, expert says
summary: Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo has the support of a group of Nevada Democrats in his race against Attorney General Aaron Ford, a Democrat, the governor’s campaign announced Monday.

name: UNLV launches Nevada’s first sport hospitality management degree program
summary: UNLV says the 120-credit program was built with industry leaders to meet Las Vegas sports workforce demand.

name: Primm avoids ghost town fears with Terrible's operation deal
summary: Primm, a small oasis community on the California state line, is no longer facing the prospect of becoming a modern-day ghost town after a deal was finalized to shift several local properties to Terrible’s.
